message:
fix(bracket): drive release future to completion when dropped during Releasing phase (asupersync-3qn7o)

The Drop handler only covered BracketPhase::Using, so if the bracket
future was dropped while the release future was in progress (Releasing
phase returned Pending), the release was silently abandoned — violating
the bracket guarantee that release always runs.

Extended Drop to also match BracketPhase::Releasing, extracting the
in-progress release future via std::mem::replace and driving it to
completion with the existing noop-waker spin loop.

Added regression test bracket_drop_during_releasing_drives_release_to_completion
using a TwoPollRelease future that returns Pending then Ready.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
